description: Main learning videos for understanding how math is used in everyday community and village life

videos.title: Math All Around Us | How Communities Use Numbers
videos.description: Discover how communities and villages use math every day - counting people, measuring roads, tracking supplies, and making plans. Math helps us understand our world!
learningObjectives: Understand how math is used in everyday community life
Identify situations where addition and subtraction are needed
Recognise that data helps communities make decisions

questions.question: Why do villages and communities need math?
options: To count, plan, and make good decisions

videos.title: Counting and Adding in the Village | Real-Life Addition Stories
videos.description: See how villagers use addition every day - counting the total number of trees planted, adding up supplies collected, and finding out how many people helped in a project.
learningObjectives: Use addition to solve real village problems
Understand that addition finds the total

questions.question: A village planted 145 flowers on Monday and 230 flowers on Tuesday. How many flowers in total?

videos.title: Subtracting in the Village | Finding Differences and What Is Left
videos.description: Learn how subtraction is used in village life - finding how many supplies are left, how much more one village collected than another, and how many tasks remain.
learningObjectives: Use subtraction to find differences in village data
Subtract with borrowing in real-life contexts
Know when to subtract in word problems

videos.title: Village Math Practice | Addition and Subtraction Challenges
videos.description: Practice addition and subtraction problems set in a village context. Try to solve each problem before the answer is shown!
learningObjectives: Apply addition and subtraction to community scenarios
Build speed and accuracy with calculations

videos.title: How Clean Villages Use Math | Real Stories from India
videos.description: See how real villages in India use math to keep their communities clean and organised. From counting bins to measuring roads, math makes villages better!
learningObjectives: See math in action in real Indian villages
Understand why math skills matter for communities
Connect classroom learning to real life

standard.description: For students who scored >= 80% on readiness

with_prerequisites.description: For students who scored 50-79% on readiness

questions.question: A village has 235 mango trees and 148 neem trees. How many trees in total?

ifCorrect.message: Great! You can add numbers well in village contexts.

ifWrong.message: Try watching the video again and pay attention to the carrying steps.

usageNotes.purpose: Introduce students to how math is used in everyday community and village life
usageNotes.recommendationStrategy: Select playlist path based on readiness assessment score
usageNotes.sequencing: Community math introduction → Addition stories → Subtraction scenarios → Practice → Real-world application
